overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic video game showing a character walking through an abandoned urban waterfront district at night. The character moves past derelict stone buildings, overgrown vegetation, and abandoned vehicles under a dark, stormy sky with purple-tinged clouds.

events.description: character begins walking along the waterfront stone path
passing a burning oil drum casting flickering orange light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path, holding a weapon at the ready

entered.detail: stone railing running along the water's edge with arched openings
metal barrel with flames providing warm light against the dark surroundings
large historic building covered in vines and vegetation
industrial brick building with multiple windows across the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an abandoned riverside path at night, passing a burning oil drum. A stone balustrade runs along the left side overlooking the water, while a large overgrown building looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban street with overgrown buildings

events.description: moving from riverside path to open street, passing the large overgrown building
slight turn to the right as the street curves

agents.ego_description: walking past the large overgrown building and along the fenced street with abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: iron railing running along the right side of the path
derelict vehicle parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the waterfront onto a wider abandoned street, passing closely by the large vine-covered building on the left. A black metal fence lines the right side, and abandoned cars sit parked along the road under broken streetlights.

events.description: entering open plaza area with scattered outdoor seating and tables
red telephone booth becomes visible in the distance on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the abandoned plaza, navigating between scattered tables and chairs

entered.detail: scattered metal tables and chairs left outside a former café
classic British red telephone box standing on the sidewalk
multi-story brick building with large painted advertisement on the side

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open plaza filled with abandoned outdoor café seating. A historic brick building rises on the right, while a distinctive red telephone booth becomes visible ahead on the left. The ground is littered with debris and overturned chairs.

events.description: turning slightly left to navigate around the telephone booth
white van temporarily blocks view of the street ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the red telephone booth and abandoned white van, continuing down the street

entered.detail: abandoned white delivery van parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the iconic red telephone booth on the left, turning slightly to navigate around it. An abandoned white van sits parked on the right side of the narrow street as the character continues deeper into the derelict urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate riverside path into the heart of a derelict urban plaza. It begins by trailing the character past a burning oil drum along a stone balustrade, moving toward a massive overgrown building looming in the distance. As the character leaves the waterfront, the scene shifts onto a wider street where the camera passes the vine-covered facade on the left and a line of abandoned cars under broken streetlights on the right. The environment then opens into a debris-strewn plaza filled with overturned café seating and a historic brick building before turning toward a distinctive red telephone booth. Finally, the camera navigates around the booth and passes a parked white van as the character pushes deeper into the abandoned city.
